overall.description: First-person game footage showing a character walking through a grassy field at night. The character holds a wooden torch that is initially unlit and lowered, then raised and ignited to illuminate the tall grass and tree line under a dark starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field at forest edge during night

events.description: wooden torch is lowered out of frame
slight turn to the right while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through tall grass at night holding an unlit torch

entered.detail: unlit wooden torch held in left hand with metal band near top
tall wild grass covering the ground in all directions
dense line of evergreen trees marking the forest edge
dark night sky with faint stars visible above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view holding an unlit wooden torch. The character walks forward through a field of tall grass at night, with a line of pine trees visible on the right side. The torch is lowered out of view as the character continues walking through the dimly lit field under the night sky.

events.description: torch is raised and ignited, casting warm orange light on surroundings
adjusting grip on torch while maintaining forward movement

agents.ego_description: walking forward with lit torch held aloft to illuminate the path through the dark field

entered.detail: wooden torch now lit with bright orange flame at the top

segments.scene_description: The wooden torch is raised back into view and ignited, dramatically changing the scene's lighting as warm orange flame illuminates the tall grass. The character continues walking forward through the field, holding the lit torch high to light the way. The tree line gradually recedes into the distance on the right as the character moves deeper into the open field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a dark field that transforms from a dimly lit night landscape into a warm, torch-lit environment. It begins with the character walking forward through tall grass under a starry sky, holding an unlit wooden torch that is soon lowered out of view as they pass a line of pine trees. As the character continues their journey, the torch is raised back into frame and ignited, causing the lighting to shift dramatically from deep shadows to a vibrant orange glow. The scene then expands as the flame illuminates the surrounding grass, with the distant tree line receding to the right while the character moves deeper into the open field.
